title: Sus Sand
description: Gives Suspicious sand and Gravel a more 'sus' look
body:
This resource pack is designed to make suspicious sand and gravel even more suspicious.

Enjoy

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/45906780/227054880-9719e788-55d9-4faf-97eb-9e327a30a40e.png)

(Edit July 6th 2023): Is this going to be my legacy? An among us meme? XD
